candidates.why: Only available candidate mapped to revenue; although labeled as balancing item, it is the sole revenue-related line in candidate list, so must be used as top-line proxy per instructions.

variables.notes: Revenue appears to be better represented by 'Total income' in the sheet, but that row is not in the candidate list. Using 'Balancing Item - Revenue' as required by candidate constraint, but this likely understates or misclassifies revenue and should be manually checked.
No COGS-related candidates were provided; bank income statement also typically does not have a traditional COGS line. Treating COGS as zero per instructions.

candidates.why: This is operating income, not an SG&A expense; should NOT be included as SG&A per instructions to exclude income rows.
Explicit operating expense bucket that represents overhead; fits SG&A definition and is not a total/subtotal.
Clearly an SG&A-type administrative overhead component with its own values; should be included as an SG&A component.
Additional operating cost bucket, likely part of SG&A overhead; distinct component and not labeled as a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Other operating income' because it is income, not an operating expense. Selected the three expense buckets as SG&A components, all of which are non-total overhead lines.

candidates.why: Represents the gross carrying amount of capitalized R&D on the balance sheet, not the period R&D expense; does not match XRD definition.

candidates.row_label: Research and development - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Represents accumulated amortization/impairment of capitalized R&D; again a balance sheet contra-asset, not the R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Company has capitalized R&D assets, but no distinct R&D expense line is present in the income statement candidate list. XRD left empty to avoid misclassifying balance sheet amounts as expenses; manual review recommended if R&D expense is required.

candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; should not be used for XINT which targets interest expense.
Interest income on securities; not an expense item for XINT.
Appears as part of interest income aggregation; not clearly pure expense and values appear positive, so excluded for XINT.
Likely interest income on bonds; amounts appear positive in recent years; excluded from XINT which should capture expense.
Positive values suggest interest income on bank placements; not an expense.
Explicitly labeled as income; not an expense.
Appears both as blank and as negative in a separate row; ambiguous mix of income/expense; prefer explicitly labeled expense rows instead.
Primary, clearly labeled aggregate interest expense line, negative values; best first-choice for XINT.
Component of interest expense related to issued securities; good fallback if main interest expense line is missing for some years.
Interest expense on subordinated debt; another valid expense component and good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense on lease liabilities; belongs in interest expense bucket.
Income from associates/ownership stakes, not interest expense; excluded.
Label suggests operating expense excluding interest; not the interest expense itself.
Earnings attribution, not interest expense.
Same as above; not interest expense.
Label hints at payable interest but is ambiguous and has no preview values; prefer clearly defined interest expense rows first.
Ambiguous and lacks preview data; likely interest income or expense, but not needed given clearer lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of interest on lease liabilities; valid as an additional fallback for XINT.
Balance sheet accrual, largely related to investment interest; not an income statement expense line.
Generic accrual line on liabilities; not the period’s interest expense.
Generic accrual, not the P&L interest expense line.
Equity classification, unrelated to interest expense.
Equity minority interest, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Selected only clearly labeled expense items, with the main aggregate 'Interest expense' first, followed by its key components as fallbacks. Interest income and ambiguous accrual/balance sheet lines were excluded.

candidates.why: P&L line about gains/losses, not a stock measure of equity; not appropriate for book equity.
Appears to be a classification for instruments, not total equity; not a balance sheet equity total.
Equity-accounted profits, not the equity balance itself.
Component of equity rather than total equity; prefer total equity for BE.
Minority equity component; not total equity for common shareholders, though part of total equity.
Likely a reclassification or subtotal, not the clear total equity line; less ideal than explicit totals.
Explicit total equity line on the balance sheet; best representation of book equity.
Duplicate wording of total equity; also a valid representation and useful if one series is missing in some years.

variables.notes: Using the explicit total equity lines as book equity. Component lines like 'Other Equity' and minority equity are excluded since BE should capture total shareholders’ equity.

candidates.why: Represents profit from associates or similar, not minority/non-controlling interests in equity; not ideal for MIB.
P&L attribution of income to minority interests; reflects the income portion attributable to non-controlling interests.
Duplicate/variant of P&L minority interest attribution; similar role as above.
Explicit balance sheet non-controlling interests in equity; best candidate for MIB as the stock of minority interest.
Balance sheet minority interest line; likely represents non-controlling interests in equity.
Abbreviated form of minority interest on the balance sheet; same concept as above.

variables.notes: Primary MIB measure is the balance sheet non-controlling interests, with alternative balance sheet labels as fallbacks. Income statement minority interest attribution lines are included last as additional fallbacks if balance sheet items are missing.
